name: Chiles Relleno Puffs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup green chili pepper, roasted, peeled, seeded, diced (or 1 4 oz. can diced green chilies) -- drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter and flour in a food processor bowl or blender container.
2. Process until well mixed.
3. Add Monterey Jack cheese, chilies, and garlic powder. Process until well mixed.
4. Form dough into 3-inch balls; roll in Parmesan cheese.
5. Place on a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake in a 375°F oven for about 15 minutes or until golden brown. Serve warm. Makes 36.
To make ahead:
1. Form dough into balls; place on a baking sheet and freeze until firm.
2. Place in freezer bag. Store up to 2 weeks.
3. To bake, place on a greased baking sheet. Bake in a 375°F oven for 18 to 20 minutes.
